label: Tell us about yourself
answer: I'm a senior software engineer with 10+ years building production TypeScript, React, and Node applications across SaaS, privacy/compliance, and high-traffic consumer platforms. I work end to end — frontend, backend, and cloud (AWS, GCP, Cloudflare Workers) — and I'm focused on shipping reliable features, improving performance, and keeping scalable systems healthy in production.

label: What's your greatest strength?
answer: End-to-end production TypeScript and React — I take features from design through delivery with a strong reliability practice, and I'm comfortable owning the frontend, the Node backend, and the cloud infrastructure underneath.

label: Years of TypeScript experience
answer: 8+ years with TypeScript specifically (10+ years counting JavaScript) — TELL 2017–2023, Enzuzo 2023–present, including a full legacy-JS-to-TypeScript modernization.

label: Years of React experience
answer: ~9 years with React in production (TELL 2017–2023, Enzuzo 2023–present).

label: Years of Node.js experience
answer: 10+ years building Node.js backend services and APIs (Nyrion 2013–2017, TELL 2017–2023, Enzuzo 2023–present).

label: Years of AWS experience
answer: ~6 years with AWS in production (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, ECS) across Nyrion and Enzuzo, including an AWS-to-GCP migration.

label: Years of GCP experience
answer: ~3 years with Google Cloud (Cloud Run, GKE, BigQuery, Pub/Sub) at Enzuzo, including migrating production workloads from AWS to GCP.

label: Years of Cloudflare experience
answer: ~3 years shipping production Cloudflare Workers + Analytics Engine + KV/R2 at Enzuzo (real-time consent analytics platform); also used Cloudflare at TELL.

label: Years of PostgreSQL experience
answer: 10+ years with PostgreSQL (and MySQL) across all three roles.
